title: Trump threatens to attack Iranian nuclear facilities and oil surges amid war tension
summary: The Pentagon estimates the cost of a military operation at 6 trillion yen while Goldman Sachs forecasts crude at $120 if tensions persist.

title: Europe reinforces supply of critical minerals amid shortage of rare earths and germanium
summary: Rising prices boost mining projects in Spain and European self-sufficiency in strategic materials for technology and energy.

title: Wall Street closes higher driven by semiconductors and strong corporate results
summary: The Dow Jones rises 385 points, the S&P 500 gains 0.89%, and the Nasdaq 1.29% in a session of broad gains.

title: AI investment diversifies into infrastructure and industrial applications
summary: AI demand fuels investment in power grids and a return to traditional industry, while doubts grow about the sustainability of the tech bubble.

title: Halliburton reports 15.8% increase in second-quarter earnings
summary: The oilfield services company posted a profit of $534 million in the period.

title: London Stock Exchange plans to operate nearly 24 hours a day starting next year
summary: The project aims to extend trading hours to attract liquidity and compete with other global markets.

title: ECB keeps rates at 2.25% and banks tighten credit conditions
summary: The European Central Bank leaves rates unchanged as a survey reveals a tightening of lending standards for companies.

title: Developed market debt to hit record $75.8 trillion, says Fitch
summary: Rising sovereign debt and fiscal pressures put France and other developed countries on alert.

title: Traditional valuation indicators lose effectiveness in current market
summary: Experts debate whether classic metrics remain reliable in an environment of low interest rates and high tech capitalization.

title: Nikkei rises driven by semiconductor gains and recovery of Asian stock markets
summary: Tech stocks lead gains in Asia, with the Japanese index benefiting from the strong performance of US chips.

title: Danaher plunges more than 11% after reporting quarterly results
summary: Shares of the life sciences company fall sharply after the release of its second-quarter earnings.

title: Ibex 35 recovers 19,300 points supported by the banking sector
summary: Spanish banks lead the index gains, with CaixaBank among the stocks breaking through technical resistances.

title: Chinese market faces challenges as state funds shift toward tech stocks
summary: Public investment in China moves to the technology sector amid economic difficulties and regulatory changes.

title: Investors fear bets on Japanese bonds become new 'widow-maker' trap
summary: Pressure on Japanese government debt increases due to rising oil and a weak yen, pushing bond yields higher.
